ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "fk_customer" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered for the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer enrolled in the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's loyalty program participation */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_customer")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "fk_merchant" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "merchant_type" TEXT /* Type/category of the merchant (e.g., retail, dining) */,
  "merchant_category" TEXT /* Category of the merchant (e.g., food, clothing) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the merchant (e.g., retail, hospitality) */,
  "merchant_rating" REAL /* Rating of the merchant based on customer reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_merchant")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchant_branches" (
  "fk_merchant_branch" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the branch */,
  "fk_merchant" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant to which the branch belongs */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "branch_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the branch */,
  "branch_email" TEXT /* Email address of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_merchant_branch"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merchant_branches_fk_merchant FOREIGN KEY ("fk_merchant") REFERENCES merchants ("fk_merchant")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "fk_reward" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., discount, gift card) */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to redeem the reward */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reward */,
  "reward_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the reward */,
  "reward_image" TEXT /* Image representing the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_reward")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "fk_merchant" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant making the transaction */,
  "fk_merchant_branch" INTEGER /* ID of the branch of the merchant */,
  "fk_customer" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the transaction */,
  "fk_history_reward" INTEGER /* ID of the reward history associated with the transaction */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Current status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "spent" REAL /* Amount spent in the transaction */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction including rewards */,
  "fk_reward" INTEGER /* ID of the reward associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, return) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_fk_merchant FOREIGN KEY ("fk_merchant") REFERENCES merchants ("fk_merchant"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_fk_customer FOREIGN KEY ("fk_customer") REFERENCES customers ("fk_customer"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_fk_merchant_branch FOREIGN KEY ("fk_merchant_branch") REFERENCES merchant_branches ("fk_merchant_branch"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_fk_reward FOREIGN KEY ("fk_reward") REFERENCES rewards ("fk_reward")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_histories" (
  "fk_history_reward" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reward history entry */,
  "fk_customer" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the reward */,
  "fk_reward" INTEGER /* ID of the reward that was earned or redeemed */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was earned */,
  "redeemed_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was redeemed */,
  "reward_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the earned reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_history_reward"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_histories_fk_customer FOREIGN KEY ("fk_customer") REFERENCES customers ("fk_customer"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_histories_fk_reward FOREIGN KEY ("fk_reward") REFERENCES rewards ("fk_reward")
)

CREATE TABLE "points_earned" (
  "fk_points_earned_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the points earned entry */,
  "fk_customer" INTEGER /* ID of the customer earning points */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date points were earned */,
  "point_type" TEXT /* Type of points earned (e.g., purchase points, referral points) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_points_earned_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_earned_fk_customer FOREIGN KEY ("fk_customer") REFERENCES customers ("fk_customer")
)

CREATE TABLE "points_redeemed" (
  "fk_points_redeemed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the points redeemed entry */,
  "fk_customer" INTEGER /* ID of the customer redeeming points */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Number of points redeemed */,
  "date_redeemed" TEXT /* Date points were redeemed */,
  "point_type" TEXT /* Type of points redeemed (e.g., purchase points, referral points) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_points_redeemed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_redeemed_fk_customer FOREIGN KEY ("fk_customer") REFERENCES customers ("fk_customer")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_rewards" (
  "fk_customer_reward" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer reward */,
  "fk_customer" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the reward */,
  "fk_reward" INTEGER /* ID of the reward earned */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_customer_reward"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_rewards_fk_customer FOREIGN KEY ("fk_customer") REFERENCES customers ("fk_customer"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_rewards_fk_reward FOREIGN KEY ("fk_reward") REFERENCES rewards ("fk_reward")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_criteria" (
  "fk_reward_criteria" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reward criteria */,
  "fk_reward" INTEGER /* ID of the reward associated with the criteria */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to redeem the reward */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the reward */,
  "specific_product" TEXT /* Specific product required for redemption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_reward_criteria"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_criteria_fk_reward FOREIGN KEY ("fk_reward") REFERENCES rewards ("fk_reward")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "fk_transaction_item" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transaction item */,
  "fk_transaction" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the item */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_transaction_item"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_fk_transaction FOREIGN KEY ("fk_transaction") REFERENCES transactions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "fk_customer_preference" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer preference */,
  "fk_customer" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the preference */,
  "communication_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "reward_category" TEXT /* Preferred reward category (e.g., dining, retail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_customer_preference"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_fk_customer FOREIGN KEY ("fk_customer") REFERENCES customers ("fk_customer")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchant_promotions" (
  "fk_merchant_promotion" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the merchant promotion */,
  "fk_merchant" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant associated with the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_merchant_promotion"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merchant_promotions_fk_merchant FOREIGN KEY ("fk_merchant") REFERENCES merchants ("fk_merchant")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_activities" (
  "fk_system_activity" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the system activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the system activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of system activity (e.g., login, transaction) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the system activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fk_system_activity")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the admin */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the admin account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the admin account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the admin */,
  "admin_role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., super admin, merchant admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., rewards, points, notifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "fk_transaction" INTEGER /* ID of the associated transaction */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_fk_transaction FOREIGN KEY ("fk_transaction") REFERENCES transactions ("id")
)
